mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(operate_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND execute_result = 'FAILURE' AND DATE(operate_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND account_id != 0 AND DATE(operate_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND log_level = 'SECURITY' AND DATE(operate_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT DISTINCT module_name FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND module_name != '' ORDER BY module_name ASC
